text: The first image fills me with a sense of anticipation and possibility. The clean lines, glass, and empty chairs suggest a space for ideas to be born, yet also a certain sterility or waiting. The second image, with its colorful, text-laden wall about R+D, strikes me as vibrant and intellectually stimulating. The words about confusion, rhythm, and poetic image-gathering evoke in me a sense of playful uncertainty. I feel both curious and comforted by the embrace of ambiguity, as if I stand on the threshold of discovery, uncertainty my only compass.
